name: @luna/desktop
description: Electron shell for Luna (Initiative 19) — serves the packages/web production build over a pinned loopback origin

scripts.build: bun build src/main.ts --target=node --format=cjs --external=electron --outfile=dist/main.cjs && bun build src/smoke.ts --target=node --format=cjs --external=electron --outfile=dist/smoke.cjs
